body:
#### PR description:

Modify the debug statements in HGCSiliconDtId and HGCScintillatorDetId to make them simpler and user-friendly (backport of #51382 and #51385

#### PR validation:

Tested in 20_1_X version

#### If this PR is a backport please specify the original PR and why you need to backport that PR. If this PR will be backported please specify to which release cycle the backport is meant for:

Backport of #51382 and #51385
title: Phase2-hgx368B: Modify the debug statements in HGCSiliconDtId and HGCScintillatorDetId to make them simpler and user friendly (backport of #51382 and #51385
